solution: ```class Solution:
    def lastSubstring(self, s: str) -> str:
        n = len(s)
        i, j, k = 0, 1, 0
        while j + k < n:
            if s[i + k] == s[j + k]:
                k += 1
                continue
            if s[i + k] > s[j + k]:
                j = j + k + 1
            else:
                i = max(i + k + 1, j)
                j = i + 1
            k = 0
        return s[i:]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Two-pointer technique compares candidate starting positions i and j without generating substrings. Advances the pointer whose suffix is guaranteed to be smaller, achieving single pass.
